transcript: Hi, how you doin'? Who is this please?
This is Gary McDonald, who are you looking for?
Um, I was-- [beep] --calling, because I'm interested in... uh... uh... engendering a coalition.
I'm say... in starting a coalition?
With the Vat... with the Vatican City.
Who is it you wanted to talk to?
Someone there that can represent, uh-- [beep] --the teaching staff. You know, I'm calling from the Vatican City, right now.
[sigh] You want to talk to somebody in the main office.
No. They referred me here, because they said this was--
Well, this is... this is just the lunch room, I happened to be walking through.
I'm looking for, uh... uh... someone who deals with science.
Who deals with science? Because science... uh, plays a vital role in the coalition. And I am calling from Vatican City, so I need your help with it.
Probably you want to talk to the science-- '[beep]' --department head, then.
But we were going to be dealing with wire. Mo... mostly amalgamations of wire, you see.
